title: lygodesmia tenuifolia
intro: Lygodesmia tenuifolia, also known as the desert coral, is a perennial plant that belongs to the aster family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lygodesmia tenuifolia include treating wounds, reducing swelling, and alleviating pain, as well as being used to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
